---
title: IBM Verify
---

Metrics in this section are calculated from IBM Verify authentication and
application sign-in data.

The relevant IBM Verify tables are:

- [`ibm_verify.auth_total_logins`](../catalog/ibm_verify.qmd#auth_total_logins) - daily, CanadaLogin-wide sign-in totals
- [`ibm_verify.app_login_counts`](../catalog/ibm_verify.qmd#app_login_counts) - daily sign-in counts broken down by application
- [`ibm_verify.mfa_activity`](../catalog/ibm_verify.qmd#mfa_activity) - multi-factor authentication activity by factor and result

**Internal applications.** The following applications are typically excluded from
public-facing adoption metrics:

```sql
'Flow Application',
'GCS Migration Solution',
'GC Sign In - Profile Management App'
```

## CanadaLogin Metrics

Metrics in this section describe CanadaLogin overall, across all applications,
sourced from `ibm_verify.auth_total_logins`.

{{< include ibm_verify/sign-ins.qmd >}}

{{< include ibm_verify/sign-in-success-rate.qmd >}}

{{< include ibm_verify/cumulative-unique-users.qmd >}}

## Application Metrics

Metrics in this section describe sign-in activity broken down by application,
sourced from `ibm_verify.app_login_counts`.

{{< include ibm_verify/sign-ins-by-application.qmd >}}

{{< include ibm_verify/sign-in-success-rate-by-application.qmd >}}

{{< include ibm_verify/peak-daily-unique-users.qmd >}}

{{< include ibm_verify/cumulative-unique-users-by-application.qmd >}}

{{< include ibm_verify/applications-per-credential.qmd >}}

{{< include ibm_verify/average-daily-sign-ins.qmd >}}

## Multi-factor Authentication Metrics

Metrics in this section describe multi-factor authentication (MFA) activity,
sourced from `ibm_verify.mfa_activity`. That table has one row per day per MFA
factor (`mfa_type`) per outcome (`result`), with the number of attempts in
`count`.

{{< include ibm_verify/mfa-authentications.qmd >}}

{{< include ibm_verify/mfa-success-rate.qmd >}}

{{< include ibm_verify/mfa-activity-by-factor.qmd >}}
